allow: PowerShell(wsl -e bash -c "cd ~/portfolio/pet_grooming_app/server && bundle exec rails db:seed 2>&1")
PowerShell(wsl -e bash -c "cd ~/portfolio/pet_grooming_app/server && cat .ruby-version 2>/dev/null || echo 'no .ruby-version'; which ruby; ruby --version" 2>&1)
PowerShell(wsl -e bash -l -c "cd ~/portfolio/pet_grooming_app/server && ruby --version && bundle exec rails db:seed 2>&1")
PowerShell(wsl -e bash -c 'export PATH="$HOME/.rbenv/bin:$PATH"; eval "$\(rbenv init -\)"; cd ~/portfolio/pet_grooming_app/server && ruby --version && bundle exec rails db:seed 2>&1')
